hero.title: Discover La Paz, where the desert meets the sea
hero.subtitle: Live unforgettable adventures in the waters of Baja California Sur. Swim with sea lions and mobula rays, watch whales for the first time and explore pristine beaches.

testimonials.title: What our adventurers say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from those who have lived our expeditions.

items.name: Maria Gonzalez
items.text: The whale watching was a magical experience. The guides are very professional and take care of every detail.

items.name: Carlos Ramirez
items.text: The sandboarding was incredible! I never thought sliding down the dunes would be so much fun. I'll be back soon!

items.name: Laura Martinez
items.text: The secret beaches are truly paradise. A very well-organized tour with excellent service.

comparison.title: What usually ruins a safari...
comparison.titleHighlight: and how we do it differently
comparison.subtitle: Direct comparison: what happens with many tours vs. how we work at Keabelmet

problems.title: Too many people on the boat
problems.text: Ever booked a tour and there were 20 people? The experience becomes chaotic and impersonal.

problems.title: No ethics and zero science
problems.text: Guides who don't respect the animals or explain anything... and that changes everything.

problems.title: Promised photos... that never arrive
problems.text: They promise them, but they never arrive or don't meet expectations. That's not professional.

solutions.title: Small groups
solutions.text: With us, small groups per boat. More space, calm, and safety.

solutions.title: Keabelmet Guide
solutions.text: We share stories, animal behaviors, and best practices to protect wildlife.

solutions.title: Photos and videos included
solutions.text: What you experience, you take home. We include photos and videos with premium editing and printing options.

expeditions.title: Our expeditions
expeditions.subtitle: Designed for responsible encounters with marine wildlife and unique landscapes.

whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.subtitle: We are passionate about sharing the magic of La Paz through authentic, sustainable, and unforgettable adventures

features.title: Local Expertise
features.text: Based in La Paz, we know every corner and the best times to visit each spot.

features.title: Safety First
features.text: Certified guides, quality equipment, and safety protocols for your total peace of mind.

features.title: Small Groups
features.text: Experiences in small groups for personalized attention and authentic connections.

whyUs.bio_text: Our team includes marine biologists and specialists with extensive experience in expeditions and camps in remote areas.
whyUs.edu_text: We believe in education, conservation, and responsible tourism as the foundation of everything we do. Every expedition is an opportunity to learn and protect.

consequences.title: If you choose wrong, you could miss out on...
items: Encounters affected by poor logistics or massive groups.
Negative impact on wildlife from bad practices.
Inadequate water safety and little guidance during the experience.
No photos or video, and memories that won't come back.

items.q: Do I need prior experience to participate?
items.a: Not always. The required level depends on the experience you choose. For each tour we clearly indicate the requirements and accompany you so you feel safe and enjoy the experience to the fullest.

Each experience may vary depending on the activity, but generally includes: specialized guide, boat or transportation, required technical equipment, safety measures and gear, water and snacks, photo and video material, and educational material when applicable.

These are seasonal experiences that depend on natural conditions, so we cannot guarantee a specific sighting. What we do guarantee is good logistics and the team's best effort. If the weather is not favorable, we look to reschedule the experience or offer alternatives so you have the best experience.
